news.title: Micron is tech's new margin king as memory crisis pushes company past Nvidia and Meta
news.summary: Micron said in its earnings report that its gross margin jumped to 84.9% from 39% a year ago.

news.title: Anthropic accuses Alibaba of campaign to 'brazenly' and 'illicitly' extract AI capabilities
news.summary: The letter, which was obtained by CNBC, claims Alibaba carried out "the largest known distillation attack on Anthropic to date."

news.title: Micron stock jumps 15% as soaring prices from memory crunch lead to quadrupling of revenue
news.summary: Micron's quarterly earnings report follows a 700% surge in the memory maker's stock price over the past year.

news.title: Qualcomm stock pops 15% after chipmaker almost doubles projection for 2029 non-handset revenue
news.summary: Qualcomm's primary business has been smartphones, which accounted for two-thirds of the company's product revenue in it's most recent quarter.

news.title: Bitcoin falls back under $60,000, hitting its lowest level since October 2024
news.summary: Bitcoin, now in the eighth month of its bear market, dropped to an October 2024 low amid a pullback in tech stocks.

news.title: This industrial play has been a quiet winner in 2026. Why the stock has more room to go

news.title: Nvidia's Huang calls black market data centers made of smuggled parts a 'dead end'
news.summary: Washington regulators and the Trump administration are increasingly wary of China getting ahold of advanced AI software and hardware.

news.title: Broadcom stock needs a win. The new OpenAI co-designed Jalapeno chip might do the trick

news.title: Dow inclusion is not a reason to buy Alphabet. But these other reasons may be
news.summary: The recent crack in the AI trade might open the door.

news.title: Cerebras CEO says margin forecast was 'misunderstood' as stock plummets after earnings

news.summary: Zoox is updating its robotaxis as the Amazon division plots expansion in additional markets and prepares to charge for rides.

news.title: Slate Auto says $24,950 electric truck will be profitable; targets positive cash flow next year
news.summary: EV startup Slate Auto CEO Peter Faricy told CNBC that every vehicle the company produces will be gross margin positive.

news.title: South Korea’s biggest chipmaker SK Hynix plans to raise $29 billion via Nasdaq listing as soon as July 10
news.summary: The company plans to issue 17.79 million new shares at a value of 45.45 trillion won ($29.65 billion).

news.title: Morgan Stanley doubles China humanoid robot shipment forecast as commercialization accelerates
news.summary: Morgan Stanley has sharply raised its outlook for China's humanoid robotics market, as early commercial deployment in real-world scenarios accelerated.

news.title: Alphabet added to Dow Jones Industrial Average, replacing Verizon
news.summary: Alphabet will replace Verizon in the Dow Jones Industrial Average.

news.title: Micron Soars After AI-Fueled Forecast Shatters Estimates
news.summary: Micron Technology Inc., the largest US maker of computer memory chips, surged in late trading after its quarterly sales forecast crushed Wall Street estimates, signaling that an AI-fueled growth run remains strong.

news.title: Qualcomm Projects Data Center Sales of $15 Billion by 2029
news.summary: Qualcomm Inc., trying to expand its dominance from mobile phone chips, forecast sales of more than $15 billion a year by fiscal 2029 in the booming market for AI components in data centers.

news.title: Warren Calls for AI Antitrust Scrutiny, Deal Review Revamp
news.summary: Massachusetts Democratic Senator Elizabeth Warren urged Congress to push for greater antitrust enforcement on emerging technologies such as artificial intelligence and to revamp merger law to make more information public.

news.title: DoubleLine’s Sherman: AI ‘Early’ in Tapping Bond Market
news.summary: Jeff Sherman, Deputy Chief Investment officer at DoubleLine Capital, joined the program to analyze recent developments in the U.S. Treasury market. The discussion focused on recent moves in Treasury yields, including a notable drop in the 10-year yield by 10 basis points to just above 4.3%. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

news.title: Morgan Health CEO: Tech, GLP-1s, Labor Driving up Costs
news.summary: Dan Mendelson, CEO of Morgan Health, highlighted the disproportionate impact of rising health insurance costs on small businesses in the U.S., citing premium increases of 20-25% as a significant challenge. He explained that cost drivers include expensive new medical technologies like GLP-1 drugs and labor costs, which constitute about 70% of hospital expenses. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Kati...

news.title: Micron and Qualcomm Lift Chipmakers Amid Rapid AI Growth
news.summary: Shares of semiconductor stocks are soaring in extended trading on Wednesday, following a strong financial report from Micron Technology Inc. that underscored how artificial intelligence remains a major vector for growth.

news.title: Micron Forecast Shatters Estimates
news.summary: Micron the largest US maker of computer memory chips, delivered a sales forecast that topped Wall Street estimates after AI-fueled shortages of the components sent prices soaring.  Bloomberg Intelligence Semiconductor Analyst Jake Silverman and Host of Bloomberg Tech Ed Ludlow react saying the earnings show Micron's pricing power. (Source: Bloomberg)

news.title: Google Poised to Lose Two More Senior AI Staffers to Anthropic
news.summary: Two leading artificial intelligence researchers at Alphabet Inc.’s Google are planning to leave for rival Anthropic PBC, according to people familiar with the matter, adding to a series of high-profile departures that risk undercutting the search giant’s position in AI.Jonas Adler and Alexander Pritzel, both viewed internally as key contributors to Google’s Gemini AI model, are set to move to the ...

news.title: Micron's Growth Rate Is Remarkable, Munster Says
news.summary: Deepwater Asset Management Managing Partner Gene Munster breaks down Micron earnings on "Bloomberg The Close." He says hyperscalers will grow faster for longer than investors expected. (Source: Bloomberg)

news.title: Micron Sales Forecast Shatters Estimates on AI Demand
news.summary: Micron Technology Inc. delivered a sales forecast that topped Wall Street estimates after AI-fueled shortages of components sent prices soaring. Revenue is projected to be $50 billion for the fiscal fourth quarter. Earnings come in at $25.31. Matt Bryson of Wedbush Securities reacts.  (Source: Bloomberg)

news.title: Alphabet’s Dow Debut Shows Index Headache in Tech-Driven Economy
news.summary: Alphabet Inc.’s addition to the Dow Jones Industrial Average marks another step in the benchmark’s effort to catch up with a market increasingly defined by Big Tech.

news.title: Memory Chipmaker SK Hynix's $29 Billion US Listing Seizes on AI Demand
news.summary: SK Hynix Inc. is seeking 45.45 trillion won ($29.4 billion) in a US listing, tapping investor demand for high-flying memory-chip stocks even after a major selloff shook the group this week.

news.title: Focused on AI at the Enterprise Level: Ganguly
news.summary: Raj Ganguly, co-founder and co-CEO of B Capital, joins Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Deals." They discuss how the use case for software is not going away and Ganguly's belief that enterprise services are the next wave AI growth. (Source: Bloomberg)

news.title: Anthropic Accuses Alibaba of ‘Illicitly’ Accessing AI Models
news.summary: Anthropic PBC accused Chinese technology giant Alibaba Group Holding Ltd. of waging a large-scale effort to “illicitly” access its Claude artificial intelligence model using thousands of fraudulent accounts that undermine the US AI developer’s decision to keep its products out of China.

news.title: MGX’s $50B Raise Sets Up One of the Biggest AI Funds Ever
news.summary: Bloomberg's Jennifer Surane joins Dani Burger and Scarlet Fu on "Bloomberg Deals." Abu Dhabi’s MGX has raised close to $50 billion from regional and global investors to accelerate spending on artificial intelligence infrastructure and technology, according to people familiar with the matter. (Source: Bloomberg)

news.title: Qualcomm Says Data Center Chips to Produce ‘Billions’ in ’27
news.summary: Qualcomm Inc. said its expansion into chips for data centers will produce “billions” in revenue in the fiscal year that begins in October, suggesting the company is gaining a foothold in the booming market for AI gear.

news.title: HSBC's Oden Highlights Potential in Chip Sector Amid Market Volatility & AI Growth
news.summary: Racquel Oden, US Head of International Wealth, Asset Management, and Global Private Banking at HSBC, discussed the current market dynamics surrounding the chip sector, particularly focusing on Micron's influence. She emphasized the importance of maintaining a long-term investment perspective despite short-term volatility driven by fluctuating oil prices and uncertain interest rate directions signa...

news.title: SK Hynix Seeks $29B With US Listing to Fund AI Boom
news.summary: Bloomberg Intelligence's Jake Silverman joins Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Deals.SK Hynix is planning to raise $29.4 billion in a landmark US listing, as companies along the artificial intelligence supply chain rush to increase capacity to meet memory chip demand. (Source: Bloomberg)

news.title: Qualcomm to Buy Modular for $3.9B to Help AI Push
news.summary: Bloomberg's Ryan Gould joins Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Deals." Qualcomm said it is acquiring Modular for about $3.9 billion in stock, adding artificial intelligence software capabilities that will aid its push into data centers. (Source: Bloomberg)

news.title: SPAC Deals Seen as Key Path to Public Market in Data Center Boom
news.summary: The rebound in blank-check companies is proving to be a useful route to public markets for companies involved in the artificial intelligence-data center build-out, said Betsy Cohen, a veteran of SPAC dealmaking.

news.title: Sony Pictures Invests $100 Million in Giant Screen Startup Cosm
news.summary: Sony Pictures Entertainment is investing $100 million in Cosm, an operator of large-screen theaters that show films and sporting events.

news.title: SpaceX Holder Andreessen Says Starship Opens Path to AI in Space
news.summary: Andreessen Horowitz LLC General Partner David George, an investor in SpaceX, said the “rapid reusability” of the new Starship rocket will be crucial to delivering on Elon Musk’s bet on orbital data centers to expand AI computing capacity.

news.title: OpenAI Unveils First Custom AI Chip With Broadcom | Bloomberg Tech 6/24/2026
news.summary: Bloomberg’s Ed Ludlow takes a look at OpenAI's first custom AI chip, called Jalapeno, developed in partnership with Broadcom. Plus, SK Hynix is planning to raise $29 billion in a landmark US listing. And, Cerebras CEO Andrew Feldman weighs in on the company's first quarterly earnings since going public. (Source: Bloomberg)

Meanwhile, South Korea's SK Hynix pursues a landmark US listing to help fund its AI ambitions. BlackRock's Gargi Chaudhuri, Simplify's Paisley Nardini and Hollow Brook's Philip Richter discuss where investors can find opp...

news.title: Andreessen's George Says SpaceX Has Path to AI in Space
news.summary: David George, a general partner at Andreessen Horowitz LLC and early SpaceX investor, says Elon Musk's newly public company has the capability to pull off the big bet on artificial-intelligence computing capacity in space. He speaks with Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

news.title: Why AI Makes Memory Demand Less Cyclical
news.summary: Celine Woo, portfolio manager and analyst at Lazard Asset Management, explains why the firm sees opportunities not on the largest AI capex spenders, but on where that capital flows, the hardware supply chain companies enabling AI infrastructure. She joins Ed Ludlow to discuss on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

news.title: SK Hynix Caps Come-From-Behind AI Success With US Stock Listing
news.summary: South Korea’s SK Hynix Inc. is making its debut with American investors with a blockbuster US stock listing, capping one of the most dramatic success stories in the AI industry.

news.title: Cerebras stock plunges after earnings as CEO says margin outlook was misunderstood
news.summary: In its first earnings report since going public, the AI chipmaker forecast a narrower gross margin in its core business, scaring investors.

news.title: AI was supposed to kill engineering jobs, but new data suggests they’re the most resilient
news.summary: While AI dominates the layoff narrative, engineers are actually making up a larger share of new hires, according to SignalFire data.

news.title: AI researchers continue to leave Google for its rivals
news.summary: Top AI researchers Jonas Adler and Alexander Pritzel are leaving Google for Anthropic, following departures from top scientists Noam Shazeer and John Jumper.

news.title: The memory chip crunch is paying off for this US company
news.summary: Revenue quadrupled to $41.45 billion compared with the same period a year ago. The company's profit, meanwhile, rose from $1.88 billion to an incredible $28.2 billion year-over-year.

news.title: New website names and shames companies that still don’t offer passkeys to users
news.summary: According to a new site, 24% of the most popular websites in the world don't offer support for passkeys, which are considered the most secure way to log in to apps and services.

news.title: Companies are scrambling to stop employees from maxing out AI budgets with small tasks
news.summary: The tokenmaxxing era was brief. We now appear to be entering the era of token rationing.

news.title: Here’s why Slate changed the battery in its cheap EV truck
news.summary: While there was probably a moment when Slate’s leadership had to green-light the switch from one battery type to another, the momentum toward that decision had been building for years.

news.title: Facebook rolls out an AI companion app for creators
news.summary: The new app, which is currently being tested with select creators, will have Facebook's recently launched AI creator assistant built into it.

news.title: Deezer says its new feature lets fans remix songs with artist consent
news.summary: Global music streaming service Deezer is taking a contrarian approach to AI, even as it adds a feature that lets fans remix songs.

news.title: Agility Robotics plans to go public via SPAC in a $2.5B deal
news.summary: Agility Robotics, the humanoid robotics startup that spun out of Oregon State University in 2015, expects to generate $620 million in proceeds.

news.title: NTSB launches probe into fatal Texas Tesla crash
news.summary: The safety board, known for its thorough investigations, is probing the crash alongside the National Highway Traffic Safety Administration.

news.title: Figma adds code layers, support for animations, more AI features in new update
news.summary: Figma's update adds a new code layer, support for motion and shaders, and the ability to create custom plug-ins for various tasks using AI.

news.title: Zoox upgrades its robotaxi as it prepares for commercial service
news.summary: The new Zoox robotaxi has more cushioning, lighter colors, and a better microphone and speaker for communicating with Zoox Support.

news.title: This new tracking label could help solve cargo theft

news.title: OpenAI unveils its first custom chip, built by Broadcom

news.title: If you want to cut your screen time, just get a Brick
news.summary: After years of struggling to curb my screen time, apparently all I needed was a $59 hunk of plastic.

news.title: 3 days left to save up to $190 on your TechCrunch Founder Summit 2026 pass
news.summary: You have just 3 days left to save up to $190 on your pass to TechCrunch Founder Summit 2026 before Early Bird rates end on June 26 at 11:59 p.m. PT. Register today.

news.title: How to invest when everything is moving too fast

news.title: A new paper argues Microsoft exaggerated its quantum claims a year ago
news.summary: A critique published in Nature Wednesday calls the basic technology behind Microsoft's "breakthrough" quantum computing chip the Majorana 1 into question. Microsoft unveiled the chip in February 2025 and said it featured a brand-new technology known as a topological qubit. Topological qubits, they said, would be the "building blocks" for their future quantum computer. Microsoft […]

news.title: Congresswoman denies staff used AI to write defense funding amendment
news.summary: Rep. Anna Paulina Luna (R-FL) says her staff used AI for "spellcheck" in an amendment summary for a major defense bill, but denies it was used for the bill text itself and says "NO Legislation is ever drafted with AI." Luna issued the response after accounts on X began sharing screenshots of an amendment summary […]

AAPL.fact_check: Apple 제품에 대한 Prime Day 할인은 실제로 존재하며, 이는 소비자들에게 긍정적인 영향을 미칠 수 있습니다. 그러나 시장 전반의 불안감이 Apple 주가에 부정적인 영향을 미칠 수 있습니다.
AAPL.sentiment_reason: 뉴스에서 Apple 제품에 대한 긍정적인 할인 소식이 있었으나, Fear & Greed 지수가 낮고 시장 전반의 불안감이 존재합니다.
AAPL.key_insight: Apple 주가는 현재 시장 불안감 속에서도 비교적 안정적입니다. Prime Day 할인은 소비자 수요를 자극할 수 있으며, 이는 단기적으로 긍정적인 영향을 줄 수 있습니다. 그러나 시장의 전반적인 불안감은 주의가 필요합니다.
AAPL.recommendation_reason: 시장 불안감이 존재하므로 신중한 접근이 필요합니다.
catalysts: Prime Day 할인으로 인한 매출 증가 가능성
AAPL.summary_one_line: Apple 주가는 시장 불안감 속에서도 Prime Day 할인으로 인한 긍정적 영향을 받을 수 있습니다.

MSFT.fact_check: Microsoft의 최근 Surface 제품 발표는 사실이며, 양자 컴퓨팅 칩 관련 주장은 과장된 것으로 보입니다. 8-K 공시는 공식 확인되었습니다.
MSFT.sentiment_reason: 분석가들의 강력한 매수 추천과 긍정적인 목표가, 그러나 시장의 두려움 지수와 주가 하락이 혼재되어 있습니다.
MSFT.key_insight: Microsoft는 새로운 Surface 제품을 출시하며 소비자 시장을 확장하고 있습니다. 양자 컴퓨팅 기술에 대한 과장된 주장이 있지만, 장기적으로는 기술 혁신이 기대됩니다. 현재 주가는 하락세지만, 분석가들의 높은 목표가는 긍정적인 신호입니다.
MSFT.recommendation_reason: 분석가들의 강력한 매수 추천과 높은 목표가 때문입니다.
MSFT.summary_one_line: Microsoft는 기술 혁신과 새로운 제품 출시로 장기적 성장 가능성이 높습니다.

GOOGL.fact_check: Alphabet의 다우존스 지수 편입은 공식적으로 확인된 사실이며, AI 연구원들의 이탈은 실제로 발생하고 있는 문제입니다. 다만, 다우존스 편입이 주가에 미치는 영향은 과장될 수 있습니다.
GOOGL.sentiment_reason: 분석가의 강력한 매수 추천과 다우존스 편입이라는 긍정적 요소가 있지만, AI 인재 유출과 시장의 두려움 지수가 부정적 영향을 미칩니다.
GOOGL.key_insight: Alphabet이 다우존스 지수에 편입되면서 주가에 긍정적 영향을 미칠 수 있습니다. 그러나 AI 인재 유출은 장기적으로 회사의 기술 경쟁력에 부정적 영향을 줄 수 있습니다. 투자자들은 이러한 요소들을 균형 있게 고려해야 합니다.
GOOGL.recommendation_reason: 다우존스 편입과 AI 인재 유출이라는 상반된 요소들이 존재하기 때문입니다.
risk_factors: AI 인재 유출로 인한 기술 경쟁력 약화
GOOGL.summary_one_line: Alphabet의 다우존스 지수 편입은 긍정적이지만, AI 인재 유출은 주의가 필요합니다.

AMZN.fact_check: Amazon의 Zoox 로보택시 확장은 공식 발표된 사실이며, Prime Day의 할인 정보도 실제로 확인되었습니다. SEC 공시는 공식 문서로 신뢰할 수 있습니다.
AMZN.sentiment_reason: 분석가의 강력한 매수 추천과 긍정적인 뉴스에도 불구하고, 시장의 두려움 지수와 중립적인 투자자 심리가 반영되었습니다.
AMZN.key_insight: Amazon의 로보택시 확장은 미래 성장 가능성을 보여줍니다. Prime Day의 성공적인 할인은 매출 증가에 긍정적 영향을 미칠 수 있습니다. 그러나 시장의 두려움 지수는 투자자들이 신중하게 접근해야 함을 시사합니다.
AMZN.recommendation_reason: 분석가의 강력한 매수 추천과 긍정적인 성장 전망 때문입니다.
AMZN.summary_one_line: Amazon은 긍정적인 성장 전망을 가지고 있지만, 시장의 두려움 지수는 주의가 필요합니다.

NVDA.fact_check: Nvidia의 8-K 공시는 공식적으로 확인되었으며, Huang의 발언은 중국의 AI 기술 접근에 대한 우려를 반영합니다. Micron이 Nvidia를 능가했다는 주장은 과장된 측면이 있습니다.
NVDA.sentiment_reason: 분석가의 강력한 매수 추천과 긍정적인 목표가에도 불구하고 시장의 두려움 지수와 미온적인 소셜 미디어 반응이 혼재되어 있습니다.
NVDA.key_insight: Nvidia는 여전히 AI 및 데이터 센터 분야에서 강력한 입지를 유지하고 있습니다. 최근의 시장 불안감에도 불구하고, 장기적인 성장 가능성은 여전히 높습니다. 투자자들은 단기 변동성보다는 장기적인 기술 발전에 주목할 필요가 있습니다.
NVDA.recommendation_reason: Nvidia의 강력한 기술적 입지와 분석가들의 긍정적인 전망을 고려할 때 장기적인 매수 기회로 보입니다.
NVDA.summary_one_line: Nvidia는 장기적인 기술 발전과 시장 수요 증가로 인해 매수 기회가 될 수 있습니다.

META.fact_check: Micron의 실적 개선은 사실이지만, 이는 Meta의 직접적인 성과와는 무관합니다. Facebook의 AI 앱 출시는 공식 확인된 사실입니다.
META.sentiment_reason: Meta의 AI 앱 출시는 긍정적이나, 시장의 전반적인 불안감이 영향을 미치고 있습니다.
META.key_insight: Meta의 AI 기술 발전은 장기적인 성장 가능성을 보여줍니다. 그러나 현재 시장의 불안감은 주가에 부정적인 영향을 미칠 수 있습니다. 투자자는 단기 변동성을 고려해야 합니다.
META.summary_one_line: Meta의 AI 기술 발전은 긍정적이지만, 시장 불안감으로 인해 관망이 필요합니다.

TSLA.fact_check: Tesla의 주가는 최근 하락했지만, 분석가들의 평균 목표가는 여전히 현재가보다 높습니다. Fear & Greed 지수는 두려움을 나타내고 있지만, Stocktwits의 투자자들은 중립적인 태도를 보이고 있습니다.
TSLA.sentiment_reason: 분석가들의 긍정적인 목표가와 중립적인 투자자 심리가 긍정적인 영향을 미쳤습니다.
TSLA.key_insight: Tesla의 주가는 최근 하락세를 보였지만, 분석가들은 여전히 긍정적인 전망을 유지하고 있습니다. 시장의 두려움 지수는 높지만, 투자자들의 의견은 중립적입니다. 이는 Tesla의 장기적인 성장 가능성에 대한 신뢰를 반영할 수 있습니다.
TSLA.recommendation_reason: 현재 시장의 두려움과 주가 하락세를 고려할 때, 추가적인 시장 상황을 지켜보는 것이 좋습니다.
TSLA.summary_one_line: Tesla의 주가는 하락했지만, 장기 성장 가능성에 대한 신뢰는 여전히 유지되고 있습니다.

market_summary.market_summary: 오늘 시장은 전반적으로 불안한 분위기 속에서 혼조세를 보이고 있습니다. 주요 기술주들이 긍정적인 성장 가능성을 보이고 있지만, 시장의 두려움 지수는 여전히 높습니다.
market_summary.top_mover_reason: Nvidia는 장기적인 기술 발전과 시장 수요 증가로 인해 매수 기회가 될 수 있습니다.
market_summary.today_strategy: 투자자들은 시장의 불안감을 고려하여 신중하게 접근해야 합니다. 장기적인 성장 가능성이 있는 종목에 주목하면서도 단기적인 시장 변동성에 대비하는 것이 중요합니다.

daily_insights.Topic_Title: Micron의 AI 수요 급증에 따른 메모리 칩 시장의 급성장
daily_insights.Full_Summary: Micron Technology의 최근 실적 보고서에 따르면 AI 수요로 인한 메모리 칩 부족이 발생하며 매출 전망이 월스트리트의 예상을 크게 초과했습니다. 이는 Micron의 주가를 급등시키고, 반도체 산업 전반에 긍정적인 영향을 미치고 있습니다. Qualcomm 또한 데이터 센터 칩 시장에서의 성장을 예측하며, AI 기술의 확산이 반도체 시장에 미치는 영향력을 보여주고 있습니다.
daily_insights.AI_Impact_Reason: AI 수요 증가로 인한 메모리 칩 시장의 급성장은 M7 기업 주가에 매우 긍정적인 영향을 미칠 것으로 예상됩니다.
